data.name: Cartel Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Step into the shoes of a young man in a fictional 1980s Latin America. Embrace your destiny as you assume control of your family's cartel. Your mission is to rebuild your family's tarnished name and uphold the legacy, facing both challenges and opportunities along the way.

Cartel Simulator is an adult Simulator/RPG made in a unique cinematic style featuring:

  • An incredibly immersive storyline

  • Character creation system

  • An engaging combat system

  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls

  • Capture entire cities

  • Chapters 1 and 2

Discover the true events of your father's death

Unravel a deep and mysterious conspiracy about your father's death. A truth that will change how you see the world forever.

Fall in love with your childhood sweetheart or build a harem

Rekindle the spark you had with your childhood sweetheart or use your power to build a massive harem in your city.

Choose your drug business

Choose out of four different type of drug businesses and make one your own.

Become a powerful drug lord!

Take on many missions to become to most powerful drug lord the world has ever seen!
data.about_the_game:
Step into the shoes of a young man in a fictional 1980s Latin America. Embrace your destiny as you assume control of your family's cartel. Your mission is to rebuild your family's tarnished name and uphold the legacy, facing both challenges and opportunities along the way.

Cartel Simulator is an adult Simulator/RPG made in a unique cinematic style featuring:

  • An incredibly immersive storyline

  • Character creation system

  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls

  • Capture entire cities

  • Chapters 1 and 2

Unravel a deep and mysterious conspiracy about your father's death. A truth that will change how you see the world forever.

Fall in love with your childhood sweetheart or build a harem

Rekindle the spark you had with your childhood sweetheart or use your power to build a massive harem in your city.

Choose your drug business

Choose out of four different type of drug businesses and make one your own.

Become a powerful drug lord!

Take on many missions to become to most powerful drug lord the world has ever seen!
data.short_description: Step into the shoes of a young man in a fictional 1980s Latin America. Embrace your destiny navigating a world fraught with drugs, violence, and bloodshed.
data.reviews:
“It's a solid buy for the price. The story really pulls you in and I think that its an excellent starting point. I personally feel like the dev should push the morality envelope a little more. Some of the choices seem similar. The combat is a cool add-on and there is definitely a lot of room to expand on it. For what it is right now I want to say it is a solid contender for adult gaming in general. I really hope you get some momentum on this game because it has something special. I look forward to updating this review as the updates come out.”
Steam

“A well written VN with great animation cuts. A solid start to an EA title. Recommend.”
Steam

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
